Albert Catalán Tatjer

I enjoy problem solving, the process of creation and the steepness of the learning curve.
Especially having fun with computer vision and data science at University.
My interests are large, design, outdoors, sports, woodworking, linguistics, smart cities.
Personal accountability is the key to a successfull work environment.
